scenarios.description: Term not in index triggers B0 false and returns empty list
scenarios.precondition: New BM25InvertedIndex with no movies added

scenarios.description: Term present but termDocs map empty triggers B0 true then B7 zero iterations and returns empty
scenarios.precondition: Use reflection to insert empty Map<Integer,Integer> for term "foo" in private index; index.put("foo", new HashMap<>()); movies remain empty; // stub to simulate no docs
pseudocode: TEST TC02 search with empty termDocs
// reflection to access private field 'index' and put empty map

scenarios.description: Single document contains term triggers B0 true, one loop iteration (B7â†’B3 trueâ†’B5) and returns single SearchResult with correct score
scenarios.expectedResult: returned list size is 1 and the sole result has docId=1 and relevanceScore == computeIDF(1)*( (1*(K+1))/(1+K*(1-B+B*(docLen/avgDocLen))) ) which simplifies to computeIDF(1)
pseudocode: assert results.size() == 1; assert results.get(0).getDocId() == 1; assert results.get(0).getRelevanceScore() == Math.log((1 - 1 + 0.5)/(1 + 0.5));

scenarios.description: Multiple documents with term triggers loop N (2 entries) and sorts by relevance descending
scenarios.expectedResult: returned list size is 2, first result.docId == 2 has higher score than result.docId == 1
pseudocode: assert results.size() == 2; assert results.get(0).getDocId() == 2; assert results.get(1).getDocId() == 1;

scenarios.description: termDocs entry exists for docId missing in movies triggers skip branch (B3 false)
scenarios.precondition: Use reflection to insert map for term "ghost" containing entry (999->1); movies map is empty; // stub to simulate missing movie
pseudocode: TEST TC05 search skips missing movie
